observed_cancer_deaths.description: Number of cancer deaths observed in the cohort of insulation workers. Used to compute the observed proportion p̂ = 26/556 = 0.0468.

cohort_size.description: Total number of insulation workers in the cohort (sample size n). Used in computing np₀q₀ for the Normal approximation check, the standard error, and both p₀ and p̂.

expected_cases.description: Expected number of cancer incident cases during the observation period based on national statistics. Used to derive the null hypothesis proportion p₀ = 14.4/556 = 0.02590.
